title: Suggest an Invoice based on Contact history
summaryBody: When a user selects a contact when creating an invoice, if we see a pattern in the contact history, suggest an invoice based on the previous invoice
detailBody: When a user selects a contact when creating an invoice, if we see a pattern in the contact history, suggest an invoice based on the previous invoice
